description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ✂ Extension Strip Checks that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow uses a concurrency group to cancel in-progress builds and checks various combinations of reduced feature flags for a Godot extension. It runs on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, clones the repository, checks out godot-cpp, sets up dependencies, loads build cache, builds the project with SCons, and prints the results.
